items.title_en: AI super rally has retail investors acting the most aggressive since trading frenzy during Covid
items.title_zh: 人工智能超级反弹让散户投资者表现出自新冠疫情期间交易狂潮以来最激进的表现

items.title_en: Bulls and bears both believe this could be 1999 all over again. Embrace it or dump your tech stocks?
items.title_zh: 多头和空头都认为 1999 年可能会重演。拥抱它还是抛售你的科技股？
items.desc_en: We are not guaranteed a close rerun of the 1999-2000 extremes. Just because things got crazier then doesn't mean that's ahead of us.
items.desc_zh: 我们不能保证 1999 年至 2000 年的极端情况会重演。仅仅因为当时事情变得更加疯狂并不意味着我们就这样了。
